tasks_completed.description: Verified data/ canonical copies exist before deleting root duplicates
tasks_completed.changes: Confirmed data/experience_details, data/projects, data/skills exist and are tracked. data/education_details not present in data/ — noted below.
tasks_completed.rationale: BA spec requires verifying data/ copies before deletion

tasks_completed.description: Added null/, education_details, experience_details, projects, skills to .gitignore
tasks_completed.changes: Added 9 lines: null/ with comment, and 4 root data file names with comment

tasks_completed.description: Removed null/ and 4 root files from git index via git rm -r --cached
tasks_completed.changes: git rm -r --cached null/ education_details experience_details projects skills — removed 7 items from index (education_details, experience_details, null/hunterbond-kdb-developer/Yuge_Tang_cover_letter_hunterbond-kdb-developer_20260405.pdf, null/hunterbond-kdb-developer/Yuge_Tang_resume_hunterbond-kdb-developer_20260405.pdf, null/index.html, projects, skills)

tasks_completed.description: Physical deletion BLOCKED by pretool-bash-safety.sh hook
tasks_completed.changes: rm -rf /root/application-assistant/null/ and rm of 4 root files was blocked. USER ACTION REQUIRED.
tasks_completed.rationale: Hook rule: rm is forbidden — user must run manually

git_rationale.why_issue_occurred: null/ directory was created as a bug artifact from a null company name. Root-level extension-less files (education_details, experience_details, projects, skills) are duplicates of canonical copies in data/. Both classes were committed to git before .gitignore rules existed.
git_rationale.how_fix_addresses_root: Files removed from git index via git rm --cached; .gitignore updated to prevent re-tracking; physical deletion requested (blocked by hook — requires user action)

dev.qa_notes: IMPORTANT: Physical deletion is still pending — blocked by pretool-bash-safety.sh hook. User must run: rm -rf /root/application-assistant/null/ && rm /root/application-assistant/education_details /root/application-assistant/experience_details /root/application-assistant/projects /root/application-assistant/skills. Once run, all acceptance criteria will be met. NOTE: data/education_details does not exist in data/ (only experience_details, projects, skills do) — the root education_details file has no canonical duplicate in data/. Deletion removes it entirely. Confirm this is intentional before running rm.

blocking_issues.blocker: Physical deletion blocked by pretool-bash-safety.sh hook
blocking_issues.impact: null/ directory and 4 root files still exist on disk. Git index is already clean (git rm --cached completed).

Root-level education_details has no confirmed canonical duplicate in data/. The BA spec says 'duplicates exist under data/' but data/ only contains experience_details, projects, skills. Deleting education_details from root removes it entirely from the repo.
blocking_issues.resolution: User should confirm whether education_details can be deleted (no data/ copy exists to fall back on)

recommendations: Run physical deletion commands after confirming education_details has no needed data/ copy
After physical deletion, run: git ls-files null/ education_details experience_details projects skills (should return empty)
Consider adding a git commit after all cleanup is complete: chore(application-assistant): remove null/ bug artifact and root data duplicates

self_verification.notes: git ls-files null/ education_details experience_details projects skills returns empty — index clean. data/ copies (experience_details, projects, skills) remain tracked. Physical files blocked by hook — outstanding user action required.
